hero.title: Optimised Prompts
hero.subtitle: Maximise the efficiency of your AI interactions

optimization.whyText1: In a world where AI is becoming indispensable, the quality of your prompts makes all the difference. An optimised prompt is not just a simple question — it is a precise instruction that guides the AI towards exactly what you need.
optimization.whyText2: Our experts have analysed more than 100,000 interactions to identify the patterns that work. The result? Prompts that generate relevant responses on the first attempt, saving you precious time.

sophie.name: Sophie M.
sophie.quote: Before using optimised prompts, I spent hours rephrasing my requests. Now I get exactly what I want in a few minutes. It's an incredible time saver!

marc.name: Marc L.
marc.quote: The difference between a basic prompt and an optimised prompt is astonishing. We reduced by 60% the time spent interacting with AI while obtaining significantly superior results.

library.title: Prompt Library
library.description: Access to thousands of tested prompts

cta.title: Optimise your prompts right now
cta.subtitle: Discover the power of optimised prompts
